head.title: Bitnet BTN | Overview

meta.name: description
meta.content: Bitnet BTN is a new peer-to-peer blockchain and financial network – made for everyone. It is truly decentralized like Bitcoin and more powerful than Ethereum.
Bitnet BTN is a new peer-to-peer blockchain and financial network – made for everyone. It is truly decentralized like Bitcoin and more powerful than Ethereum.

div.class: elementor-column elementor-col-100 elementor-top-column elementor-element elementor-element-1afdf29 elementor-invisible

div.h1: Bitnet BTN is a new peer-to-peer blockchain and financial network – made for everyone.

section.class: elementor-section elementor-inner-section elementor-element elementor-element-e4ae7ce elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default

elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-4cc1aa4 elementor-section-height-min-height elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-items-middle

div.h2: Bitnet BTN's transformative approach and key features:

section.class: elementor-section elementor-inner-section elementor-element elementor-element-be558d2 elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default elementor-invisible
elementor-section elementor-inner-section elementor-element elementor-element-25b56d0 elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default elementor-invisible

div.h3:
Fair Launch: No
Pre-allocated or
Pre-mined BTN

section.class: elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-91e2c61 elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default

elementor-section elementor-inner-section elementor-element elementor-element-3e2ca34 elementor-reverse-mobile elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default

div.class: elementor-column elementor-col-50 elementor-inner-column elementor-element elementor-element-4a8be8f elementor-hidden-tablet elementor-hidden-mobile
elementor-column elementor-col-50 elementor-inner-column elementor-element elementor-element-e88cffb elementor-invisible

div.p: In an industry where many blockchain and crypto projects have faced criticism for unfair launch practices, Bitnet BTN aims to adopt a different approach from the outset. The project features no pre-mined coins, no preferential treatment for founders or developers, and operates independently of venture capital influence, promoting equal opportunities for all participants.

This approach reflects Bitnet BTN’s commitment to decentralization, equal access, and community engagement. While contrasting with some traditional blockchain practices, it emphasizes transparency and fairness. Importantly, this website is not intended to encourage investment in BTN. Readers should conduct their own research and consult financial experts before making any decisions regarding involvement with Bitnet BTN.

Bitnet BTN officially launched with its genesis block on July 14, 2023. As an innovative peer-to-peer blockchain network, Bitnet BTN enables the creation of financial systems for everyone. It is fully decentralized, similar to Bitcoin, and more powerful than Ethereum.

Promoting transparency and trust, Bitnet BTN is open-source and remains uncontrolled and unowned by any single entity. It operates seamlessly without the need for a central authority, ensuring accessibility to anyone, anywhere. Bitnet BTN’s technology facilitates the tokenization of value, catering to both sovereign and private monetary systems.

section.class: elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-0d4afc0 elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default
elementor-section elementor-inner-section elementor-element elementor-element-e797427 elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default

div.class: elementor-column elementor-col-50 elementor-inner-column elementor-element elementor-element-2533002 elementor-invisible

div.p: Bitcoin, as the original cryptocurrency, aimed to reshape the financial landscape by offering peer-to-peer transfers without intermediaries. Bitnet BTN builds upon this vision, not just enabling mere transactions. Instead, it introduces holistic financial systems, functionalities far beyond Bitcoin’s original scope.

On the technological front, Bitcoin has faced challenges, including scalability issues and high transaction fees, which often deterred potential users. In comparison, Bitnet BTN, drawing from Ethereum’s advancements, overcomes Bitcoin’s tech shortcomings. With enhanced efficiency, speed, and affordability, its user-centric design sets new crypto benchmarks and appeals to a wider audience.

Furthermore, during Bitcoin’s early phase, a substantial portion was acquired by initial backers, leading to distribution concerns. In contrast, Bitnet BTN ensures that all its coins are generated solely through direct computational efforts, ensuring a fair distribution from the outset. This approach underscores Bitnet BTN’s commitment to fairness and equity in the cryptocurrency landscape.

In summary, while Bitcoin pioneered the decentralized finance movement, Bitnet BTN seeks to refine, elevate, and broaden its scope. The emphasis on inclusivity, fairness, and adaptability distinctly positions Bitnet BTN in the dynamic cryptocurrency landscape.

While Ethereum promotes itself as a decentralized platform, it faces criticism for its centralization tendencies. Certain entities and figures within the Ethereum community, because of their significant contributions, holdings, or staked amounts in the new Proof of Stake system, may influence protocol changes. This mirrors how powerful entities shape decisions in systems like governments or corporations.
Bitnet BTN, on the other hand, was founded on pure principles of parity, fairness, and decentralization. Having no central owner or authority makes Bitnet censorship-resistant and truly unstoppable.

Furthermore, approximately 72 million of all the Ether (ETH) in circulation were created before the network’s launch. They were distributed among the founders, the Ethereum Foundation, and early investors and contributors.

In comparison, no BTN was allocated to founders or contributors neither before nor after the network went live. Every existing BTN results from the exchange of energy and computational power, with miners contributing to the network in return for these coins.

elementor-element elementor-element-9e144a6 eael-dt-th-align-center eael-table-align-center elementor-widget elementor-widget-eael-data-table

section.class: elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-a28a065 elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default

elementor-section elementor-inner-section elementor-element elementor-element-44baaff elementor-reverse-mobile elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default

div.class: elementor-column elementor-col-50 elementor-inner-column elementor-element elementor-element-15c47a9 elementor-hidden-tablet elementor-hidden-mobile
elementor-column elementor-col-50 elementor-inner-column elementor-element elementor-element-611dcc2 elementor-invisible

div.p: What makes Bitnet BTN truly unique, in addition to the strengths compared to Bitcoin and Ethereum, are its groundbreaking Bitnet Token Standards. These BTS token standards are poised to revolutionize the blockchain landscape for several compelling reasons, while simultaneously offering 100% compatibility with Ethereum’s established ERC standards.

Appealing to the ones prioritizing the safety of their digital assets, Bitnet BTN enhances security and control with the BTS-21 token standard. Moreover, Bitnet’s commitment to innovation is evident with the BTS-HCE token standard, designed for high-compliance scenarios, showcasing its dedication to integrating digital currencies into various sectors.

Another cornerstone of Bitnet BTN’s approach is the enhanced functionality introduced by the BTS Token Standards, particularly beneficial for DApps and DeFi platform developers, offering a more versatile set of features. Lastly, simplicity is emphasized with its token creation process distilled to just two lines of code, making it accessible for aspiring token developers.

In summary, the BTS token standards stand out for their compatibility, simplicity, expanded functionality, innovative compliance solutions, and heightened security and control. These qualities could establish Bitnet BTN as a truly unique and forward-thinking player in the blockchain industry.

section.class: elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-36a6f65 elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default

elementor-section elementor-inner-section elementor-element elementor-element-3b69043 elementor-reverse-mobile elementor-section-boxed elementor-section-height-default elementor-section-height-default

div.class: elementor-column elementor-col-50 elementor-inner-column elementor-element elementor-element-eb8cad0 elementor-invisible

div.p: Bitnet BTN offers a robust feature set, serving as a powerful bridge between decentralized technology and regulatory compliance, enhancing various sectors of the financial landscape. Its specialized BTS token standards are central to this capability, enabling a variety of potential applications. These include supporting personal financial sovereignty with minimal institutional interference, enabling regulated decentralized markets that adhere to specific regulatory standards, and integrating automated taxation processes directly within transactions. Additionally, these token standards could facilitate innovative crowdfunding platforms that combine equity and utility tokens, and they could be ideally suited for issuing Central Bank Digital Currencies with robust compliance requirements.

Furthermore, BTS token standards enable advanced digital ownership arrangements with multi-layered permissions and time-based access, foster the development of complex Decentralized Autonomous Organizations that enable decentralized voting and dividend distribution, and enhance supply chain management by implementing transparent and immutable solutions that can be optionally compliant with existing regulations. These examples illustrate just a fraction of what Bitnet BTN can potentially achieve, demonstrating its capacity to merge blockchain flexibility with the exacting demands of traditional financial systems, thereby enhancing accessibility and promoting financial autonomy.

div.class: elementor-column elementor-col-50 elementor-inner-column elementor-element elementor-element-26f2b83 elementor-hidden-tablet elementor-hidden-mobile
elementor-column elementor-col-50 elementor-inner-column elementor-element elementor-element-cfb09f5 elementor-invisible

div.p: Bitnet is in its early stages. While the underlying technology and token standards have been released, it is important to note that extensive code reviews, security audits, and testing may still be required. Users should be aware that there may be technical imperfections or security vulnerabilities that could affect the operation of Bitnet.

The website operators strongly recommend that users review the results of security audits and independent code reviews conducted by the community before relying on the technology. Additionally, it is advised to regularly monitor development progress and participate in community discussions on potential risks and improvements.
